lineage.Process: CopyFeatures "Targeted Resource Areas 2025" "C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb\summary" # # # #

JoinField "C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb\summary" OBJECTID C:\Users\mjrubino\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\ToolTraining\scratch.gdb\summary_stats FID_summary # "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
CalculateFields tempLayer Python "sum_Area_SQUAREMETERS 0 #;Polygon_Count 0 #" # NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField "C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb\summary" FID_summary "Delete Fields"

SummarizeWithin "Targeted Resource Areas 2025" GAP1_2_WebMercator_noDMS_simplified "C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb\summary" KEEP_ALL # ADD_SHAPE_SUM "Square meters" # NO_MIN_MAJ NO_PERCENT #

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.2.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>summary</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>PAD_m2</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>PAD_perc</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>PAD_polys</field_name><field_type>SHORT</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField summary PAD_m2 !sum_Area_SQUAREMETERS! Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField summary PAD_polys !Polygon_Count! Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField summary PAD_polys (!PAD_m2! / !Shape_Area!)*100 Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField summary PAD_perc (!PAD_m2! / !Shape_Area!)*100 Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField summary PAD_polys !Polygon_Count! Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField summary sum_Area_SQUAREMETERS "Delete Fields"
DeleteField summary Polygon_Count "Delete Fields"

Rename "C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb\summary" "C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb\USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary" FeatureClass

CopyMultiple "'C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb\USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary' FeatureClass" "C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb" USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary_1 "USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary FeatureClass USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary_1 #"

Rename "C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb\USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary_1" "C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb\USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary_copy" FeatureClass

Rename "C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb\USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary_copy" "C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb\USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary" FeatureClass
DeleteField USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary PAD_m2 "Delete Fields"
DeleteField USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary PAD_perc "Delete Fields"
DeleteField USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary PAD_polys "Delete Fields"

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.2.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>catcharea</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>difftest</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateGeometryAttributes USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary "catcharea AREA_GEODESIC" # # # "Same as input"
DeleteField USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary difftest "Delete Fields"

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.2.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AlterField><field_name>catcharea</field_name><new_field_name>Catchment_Area</new_field_name><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><clear_field_alias>False</clear_field_alias></AlterField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.2.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\PADUS4_1_StateNC.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>PAD_Area</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>PAD_Perc</field_name><field_type>FLOAT</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>PAD_Count</field_name><field_type>SHORT</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary Catchment_Area 92115067.295856 Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary PAD_Perc "(!Catchment_Area! / !PAD_Area!) * 100" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary PAD_Perc "(!PAD_Area!/!Catchment_Area!) * 100" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary Catchment_Area 13578798.008717 Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary PAD_Perc "(!PAD_Area!/!Catchment_Area!) * 100" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary Catchment_Area 8671439.814620 Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary PAD_Perc "(!PAD_Area!/!Catchment_Area!) * 100" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary PAD_Perc round((!PAD_Area!/!Catchment_Area!) * 100, 2) Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary PAD_Area "0 if !PAD_Area! is None else !PAD_Area!" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

Project "PAD 1&2 NC - USGS Catchments\USGSCatchment_PAD_Summary" "C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\NHP_SP" PROJCS["NAD_1983_StatePlane_North_Carolina_FIPS_3200",GEOGCS["GCS_North_American_1983",DATUM["D_North_American_1983",SPHEROID["GRS_1980",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Lambert_Conformal_Conic"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",609601.22],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",-79.0],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_1",34.33333333333334],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_2",36.16666666666666],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",33.75],UNIT["Meter",1.0]] WGS_1984_(ITRF00)_To_NAD_1983 PROJCS["WGS_1984_Web_Mercator_Auxiliary_Sphere",GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Mercator_Auxiliary_Sphere"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",0.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",0.0],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_1",0.0],PARAMETER["Auxiliary_Sphere_Type",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL
Rename "C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\NHP_SP.shp" "C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US\CatchmentsEdited_SP.shp" ShapeFile

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.2.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>CatchmentsEdited_SP</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>NHP_AreaM</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>NHP_Counts</field_name><field_type>SHORT</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.2.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>CatchmentsEdited_SP</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>NHP_Area</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>NHP_Count</field_name><field_type>SHORT</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField CatchmentsEdited_SP NHP_Area !NHP_AreaM! Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField CatchmentsEdited_SP NHP_Count !NHP_Counts! Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField CatchmentsEdited_SP NHP_AreaM "Delete Fields"
DeleteField CatchmentsEdited_SP NHP_Counts "Delete Fields"

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.2.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>CatchmentsEdited_SP</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>NHP_Perc</field_name><field_type>FLOAT</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField CatchmentsEdited_SP NHP_Perc "(!NHP_Area! / !Catchment_!) * 100" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField CatchmentsEdited_SP NHP_Area "Delete Fields"
DeleteField CatchmentsEdited_SP NHP_Count "Delete Fields"
DeleteField CatchmentsEdited_SP NHP_Perc "Delete Fields"

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.2.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>CatchmentsEdited_SP</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>NHP_Area</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>NHP_Count</field_name><field_type>SHORT</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.2.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\mjrubino\OneDrive - State of North Carolina\PAD-US</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>CatchmentsEdited_SP</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>NHP_Perc</field_name><field_type>FLOAT</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField CatchmentsEdited_SP NHP_Perc "(!NHP_Area! / !Catchment_!) * 100" Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
